nameMeanings.name: Covert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Surrey, of Norman origin): habitational name from the Norman hamlet of Couvert in Calvados or from some other locality similarly named from Old French (le) covert ‘the secret corner, refuge, or thicket’. Sussex surname forms with the definite article and no preposition are not nicknames from Old French covert ‘secret(ive)’, as has been suggested, but are either references to ‘Le Covert’ as the place of origin or represent the common Norman practice of substituting le for de in surnames. This surname is now extinct in Britain.
Americanized form of an unidentified Dutch or German name, perhaps   Kofoed   or German   Gobert  .

variants.name: Coovert
meanings: Americanized form of French Couvert or its Dutch form Coevert, see Covert .

variants.name: Kofoed
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Anders, Nanna.
Danish: from ko ‘cow’ + fod ‘foot’, hence a nickname for someone with a club foot or other deformity of the foot. Compare Kofford .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: William Covert was born in 1405, in Sullington, Sussex, England, United Kingdom as the son of John Covert and Battisford. He married Grace Barentyne. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. He died on 25 September 1444, in Sussex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: William Covert est né en 1405, à Sullington, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de John Covert et Battisford. Il a épousé Grace Barentyne. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Il est décédé le 25 septembre 1444, à Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.lifeSummary: William Covert wurde 1405 in Sullington, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von John Covert und Battisford geboren. Er hat Grace Barentyne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Er starb am 25. September 1444 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: William Covert è nato il nel 1405 nel Sullington, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di John Covert e Battisford. Lui sposato Grace Barentyne. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì il 25 settembre 1444, nel Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 39 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: William Covert(은)는 1405년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 설링턴에서 John Covert(와)과 Battisford의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Grace Barentyne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1444년 9월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 수세스에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: William Covert родился в 1405 г. в местности суллингтон, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали John Covert и Battisford. Он женился на женщине по имени Grace Barentyne.
